rule_text: Defect Liability Period for AP works is fixed at TWO YEARS for both original works AND maintenance works; departments may issue work-type-specific guidelines based on nature/lifespan.
verification_method: Check tender BDS DLP = 24 months for both original + maintenance works; reject DLP < 24 months without justification

rule_text: Up to 1% of departmental budget allocation must be set aside to train AP departmental Engineers at all levels for new technologies, practices, and materials in works execution.
verification_method: Audit-level check on departmental budget allocation; not directly tender-verifiable

rule_text: Site Order Book must be maintained at every AP works site as per Codes; it must record remarks and instructions of every visiting Engineer (EE, SE, CE, ENC).
verification_method: Check tender SCC requires Site Order Book at site; physical verification at execution stage
